title: How Exactly NVIDIA Is Pulling This Off
author: Alex Kantrowitz
text:
How Exactly NVIDIA Is Pulling This Off
It’s more than a hardware advantage, NVIDIA’s software edge may be the hardest to break.
It’s not yet March and I’m already admitting defeat on my prediction that NVIDIA would remain flat in 2024. The company’s stock is up 64% this year, adding $700 billion in market cap since January. Its earnings report this week soundly beat expectations with a 265% revenue increase, sparking a $277 billion stock market pop on Thursday, the largest singl…
